name: Cartoon Party Game Assets
description: Groovy mascot-style bomb character with lit fuse and phone prop for party app graphics
prompt_template: groovy cartoon bomb mascot character, round dark navy bomb body, big expressive oval eyes with highlights, smiling face, rope fuse with bright spark at the tip, white cartoon gloves, cartoon sneakers, {phone_pose}, {character_pose}, {scene}, {composition}, {palette}, 2d vector mascot style, thick clean outlines, flat cel shading, polished mascot illustration, high readability silhouette, isolated simple background, no text, no watermark, no frame
negative_prompt: blurry, ugly, distorted, noisy, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, missing limbs, detached limbs, malformed hands, extra fingers, photorealistic, 3d render, realistic, painterly, abstract pattern, random shape blob, scary horror bomb, military weapon realism, smoke cloud explosion, text, letters, words, typography, logo text, watermark, signature, frame, border, mockup, screenshot, UI interface, photo background clutter

phone_pose: holding a smartphone in the left hand like a trivia host
holding a glowing phone up like a game controller
showing a smartphone screen toward camera
holding a phone confidently while pointing with the other hand
character_pose: hero stance with one leg forward
scene: party confetti and tiny stars around the mascot
clean sticker-like white backdrop with small accent shapes
pastel stage floor with minimal props
palette: bold arcade colors with hot pink, electric blue, yellow, and mint
bright playful colors with orange, teal, purple, and cream
vibrant cartoon colors with cyan, magenta, gold, and lime
high-energy palette with neon pink, sky blue, tangerine, and violet
